title: Forbesganj Heat Wave
lead: Forbesganj is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.00. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating a critical level of heat wave intensity.
body:
The current heat wave in Forbesganj is extremely rare, with a Z-Score of +4.00, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures.
The temperature is causing discomfort, with a relative humidity of 69% and wind speed of 16.1 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
The CDD is 13.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the HDD is 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
